description: Contract for the local status packet emitted by ghoti_status_brain.py. Local, read-only, offline. No live autonomy, no external API, no account actions.

fields.ok: boolean - true when the packet was produced without a fatal error
fields.repo_root: string - absolute path to the Ghoti repo root the brain inspected
fields.origin_main_short: string|null - short sha of origin/main (git rev-parse, read-only)
fields.latest_main_commits: array<string> - up to 5 recent origin/main commit lines (short sha + subject)
fields.n6_test_count_known_or_null: integer|null - count of test_n6_*.py test methods found by static scan, or null
fields.latest_codex_report: object|null - {path, title, milestone} of the newest 14_context/codex_*.md report
fields.latest_claude_report: object|null - {path, title, milestone} of the newest 14_context/claude_n*.md report
fields.latest_tool_intake_summary: object|null - {path, title, candidate_count} from the tool/repo intake reports
fields.computer_use_sandbox_status: object - {available, mode, runner_exists, dry_run_ok, browser_launched, dom_action_performed, os_input_used, live_website}
fields.telegram_runtime_status: string - local posture string; the bot is inventory-only and not running
fields.hermes_integration_status: string - local posture string derived from the hermes manual-bridge status file
fields.repo_visibility_unknown_or_public_privat: string - one of 'unknown'|'public'|'private'; unknown without network
fields.next_recommended_action: string - one concrete, useful next step derived from local state
fields.handoff_written: boolean - true when --write-handoff wrote the markdown handoff note
fields.handoff_path: string|null - repo-relative path of the handoff note when written
fields.gemma_used: boolean - true only when a local Ollama gemma model actually produced the summary
fields.fallback_summary_used: boolean - true when the deterministic local summary was used instead of gemma
